rules.description: Applicant must be a natural-born Filipino citizen.

cites.quote: The applicant must be a natural-born Filipino citizen.

rules.remediation: This scholarship requires natural-born Filipino citizenship.

rules.description: Applicant must have a General Weighted Average of at least 90/100.

cites.quote: The applicant must have a General Weighted Average (GWA) of at least 90 out of 100

rules.remediation: Raise GWA to at least 90, or apply to a program with a lower academic cutoff.

rules.description: Annual household income must not exceed PHP 400,000.

cites.quote: The applicant's total annual household income must not exceed PHP 400,000.

rules.remediation: Household income is above the PHP 400,000 cap. If income was misreported, file a corrected income statement; otherwise consider a merit-only scholarship without an income cap.

rules.description: Applicant must be enrolled in a priority S&T degree program.

cites.quote: The applicant must be enrolled in, or admitted to, one of the priority S&T degree programs

rules.remediation: Enroll in one of the listed priority S&T degree programs to qualify.

rules.description: Award is for incoming first-year (year level 1) students.

cites.quote: The scholarship is awarded to incoming first-year (year level 1) college students.

rules.remediation: This award begins only for incoming first-year students; upperclassmen are not eligible to start it.

rules.description: Applicant must not hold another government-funded scholarship.

cites.quote: The applicant must not be holding any other government-funded scholarship at the same time.

rules.remediation: Relinquish the other government scholarship, or choose between the two — they cannot be held concurrently.
